_meta.description: Composite-layer (L5) baselines and task-type adjustment factors
_meta.source: Default values from the metric framework §6.3–6.5 (16-session reference dataset)

ctei_baselines._note: Medians (TCER, CPE) and mean (NCPI) from the framework's reference dataset. Override these once you have your own accumulated data.

ttaf._note: Task Type Adjustment Factor (framework §6.4). Values represent relative difficulty: feature (greenfield) is the baseline 1.0.

psac._note: Project-Stage Adjustment Coefficient regression (framework §6.5): TCER ≈ -slope * LOC_accum + intercept. Neutralizes the structural TCER decline of larger codebases.

_chr_note: CHR reward factor = 1 + CHR * chr_weight (framework §6.3). A 10% CHR increase yields a 5% CTEI boost.
